name: gettoit-monorepo
description: GetToIt monorepo root. Houses ios/, web/, supabase/, design-system/, docs/, gti-vault/ as siblings per ADR 0004.

scripts.verify:web: npm run web:typecheck && npm run web:test && npm run web:build
scripts.verify:local: npm run verify:design-system && npm run verify:web && npm run verify:edge
scripts.tokens: npm run tokens:css && npm run tokens:swift
